0.text: Nodular increases in interlobular septal thickness adjacent to the mass in the posterior upper lobe of the left lung

2.text: Largest nodular lesion measuring approximately 1.6x1.2 cm in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Some nodular lesions with irregular borders

4.text: Centriacinar nodular density increases bilaterally resembling a tree-in-bud pattern

5.text: Areas of increased density consistent with consolidation and compressive atelectasis in both lungs

6.text: Air bronchograms present adjacent to the pleural effusions

7.text: Soft tissue density mass in the anterior and posterior segment of the left lung upper lobe extending towards the aorticopulmonary window

8.text: Indistinct borders from the right lung upper lobe bronchus associated with the mass
